## 6 DevTools Console output Required
**Please paste the full console output here. Include SyntaxError messages, file names, line numbers, and full stack traces.**


<!--
### Quick copy instructions for reporters
- **Chrome / Edge**: Open DevTools (F12) → Console → right-click error → **Copy** → paste into the Console output field.  
- **Firefox**: F12 → Console → right-click error → **Copy message**.  
- **Safari**: Enable Develop menu → Web Inspector → Console → select and copy text.

-->

```devtools
Example:

TypeError: Cannot read property 'foo' of undefined
    at render (app.js:45:12)
    at HTMLButtonElement.onclick (index.html:10:5)
```
